name: convex-auth
description: @convex-dev/auth multi-provider sign-in: Password (PBKDF2-SHA256 100k, self-hosted-friendly), Anonymous (guest), Google OAuth, Resend magic-link. Ships a production <SignInPage> with i18n + prop-driven provider list. No Clerk.

env.name: AUTH_RESEND_KEY
env.description: Resend API key for magic-link sender. Optional if only OAuth used.

env.name: JWT_PRIVATE_KEY
env.description: Auth signing key. Self-hosted: push via Convex REST update_environment_variables.

env.name: JWKS
env.description: Public JSON Web Key Set. Convex Auth generates both this + JWT_PRIVATE_KEY.

env.name: SITE_URL
env.description: Public site origin for magic-link callback.

env.name: AUTH_GOOGLE_ID
env.description: Google OAuth client ID. Required only when Google provider enabled.

env.name: AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET
env.description: Google OAuth client secret. SAME key as any existing Clerk app during migration so `sub` join works (per Phase 5.5).

postInstall: echo 'Add SITE_URL + AUTH_RESEND_KEY to Convex env'

notes: 0.2.0 (2026-05-17): lifted production SignInPage from CareerPack. Backend (convex/features/auth/auth.ts) already shipped Password + Anonymous + Google + PBKDF2-SHA256 100k crypto; this release fills in the frontend with login/register tabs, Google + Anonymous buttons, and i18n-via-props. PBKDF2 (not Scrypt) because Scrypt times out behind reverse proxies that gate WebSocket actions (e.g. Dokploy). Pre-migration note still applies: if migrating from Clerk, reuse the same Google client ID/secret so the OAuth `sub` join preserves identity.
